chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-605 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 21.10.2025 Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General ************** None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. Learned Assistant Advocate General submits that a notification in respect of the returned candidate for the by-election to the vacant seat of Chairman, Town Committee Fakeerabad, District Khairpur, has been issued by the Provincial Election Commission on 3rd October, 2025, whereby the petitioner himself has been declared as the returned candidate. Under such circumstances, the present petition has become infructuous. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as infructuous. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
